html:
Your Personalized Recovery Plan

Nadine’s hair is showing early regrowth even though hormonal shedding from PCOS is still lingering. Her sleep looks mostly steady but late caffeine and frequent night wakings can quietly drain recovery. This protocol anchors deeper rest, steadies hormones, and rebuilds strength through nutrition. As she moves from early regrowth toward full stabilization, each step helps her take back control while her body finishes catching up. Real change begins with small, consistent wins that compound into visible renewal. 🌱

Stay steady—each week strengthens your roots and momentum toward regrowth.
